sentences.target: Ich werfe den Brief in den Briefkasten.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvɛʁfə deːn bʁiːf ɪn deːn ˈbʁiːfˌkastn̩/

translations.de: Ich werfe den Brief in den Briefkasten.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvɛʁfə deːn bʁiːf ɪn deːn ˈbʁiːfˌkastn̩/
translations.en: I’m putting the letter in the mailbox.
translations.fr: Je mets la lettre dans la boîte aux lettres.
translations.it: Metto la lettera nella cassetta postale.
translations.ru: Я опускаю письмо в почтовый ящик.
translations.pt: Estou colocando a carta na caixa de correio.
translations.he: אני מכניס את המכתב לתיבת הדואר.
translations.vi: Tôi đang bỏ thư vào thùng thư.
translations.nl: Ik doe de brief in de brievenbus.
translations.uk: Я опускаю лист у поштову скриньку.
translations.hi: मैं पत्र डाकपेटी में डाल रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya memasukkan surat ke kotak pos.
translations.ja: 手紙をポストに入れます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, governs direct object 'den Brief' and directional PP 'in den Briefkasten'.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Brief'.
Common noun; masculine, singular, accusative; direct object of 'werfe'.
Two-way preposition; here with accusative indicates direction ('into').
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Briefkasten' as object of 'in'.
Common noun; masculine, singular, accusative; object of the preposition 'in' (goal of motion).

sentences.target: Der Postbote leert heute den Briefkasten.

translations.de: Der Postbote leert heute den Briefkasten.
translations.en: The mail carrier is emptying the mailbox today.
translations.es: Hoy el cartero vacía el buzón.
translations.fr: Le facteur vide la boîte aux lettres aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi il postino svuota la cassetta postale.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天邮递员在清空邮筒。
translations.yue: 今日郵差喺度清空郵筒。
translations.ru: Сегодня почтальон вынимает письма из почтового ящика.
translations.pt: Hoje o carteiro está esvaziando a caixa de correio.
translations.he: היום דוור מרוקן את תיבת הדואר.
translations.vi: Hôm nay nhân viên bưu điện đang lấy hết thư trong thùng thư.
translations.ar: اليوم يقوم ساعي البريد بإفراغ صندوق البريد.
translations.nl: Vandaag leegt de postbode de brievenbus.
translations.hu: Ma a postás kiüríti a postaládát.
translations.hi: आज डाकिया डाकपेटी खाली कर रहा है.
translations.el: Σήμερα ο ταχυδρόμος αδειάζει το γραμματοκιβώτιο.
translations.id: Hari ini petugas pos mengosongkan kotak pos.
translations.ja: 今日は郵便局員がポストの郵便物を回収しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject 'Postbote'.
Common noun; masculine, singular, nominative; subject of 'leert'.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, takes 'den Briefkasten' as direct object; modified by temporal adverb 'heute'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause indicating time of the action.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Briefkasten' (direct object).
Common noun; masculine, singular, accusative; direct object of 'leert'.

sentences.target: Unser Briefkasten klemmt schon seit gestern.

translations.de: Unser Briefkasten klemmt schon seit gestern.
translations.en: Our mailbox has been stuck since yesterday.
translations.es: Nuestro buzón está atascado desde ayer.
translations.fr: Notre boîte aux lettres est coincée depuis hier.
translations.it: La nostra cassetta della posta è bloccata da ieri.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的信箱从昨天起就卡住了。
translations.yue: 我哋個信箱從尋日開始就卡住咗。
translations.ru: Наш почтовый ящик заклинило со вчерашнего дня.
translations.pt: Nossa caixa de correio está travada desde ontem.
translations.he: תיבת הדואר שלנו תקועה מאז אתמול.
translations.tr: Bizim posta kutusu dünden beri sıkışmış.
translations.vi: Hộp thư nhà mình bị kẹt từ hôm qua.
translations.nl: Onze brievenbus zit sinds gisteren vast.
translations.uk: Нашу поштову скриньку заклинило ще з учора.
translations.hi: हमारी डाकपेटी कल से फँसी हुई है.
translations.pl: Nasza skrzynka pocztowa jest zablokowana od wczoraj.
translations.el: Το γραμματοκιβώτιό μας έχει κολλήσει από χτες.
translations.nb: Postkassen vår has kilt seg siden i går.
translations.id: Kotak pos kami macet sejak kemarin.
translations.sv: Vår brevlåda har fastnat sedan i går.
translations.ro: Cutia noastră poștală este blocată de ieri.
translations.cs: Naše poštovní schránka je zaseklá od včerejška.
translations.da: Vores postkasse har sat sig fast siden i går.
translations.fi: Meidän postilaatikko on jumissa eilisestä asti.
translations.ja: うちの郵便受けは昨日から詰まっている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative masculine singular; agrees with 'Briefkasten'.
Common noun; masculine, singular, nominative; subject of 'klemmt'.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive here, denotes a stuck/jammed state.
Adverb; emphasizes that the state holds earlier/sooner than expected; modifies the predicate/temporal phrase.
Preposition expressing a starting point in time; takes the adverbial complement 'gestern' in the PP 'seit gestern'.
Temporal adverb; complement of 'seit' forming the PP 'seit gestern'.

translations.fr: Tu répares la boîte aux lettres demain.
translations.it: Domani ripari la cassetta della posta.
translations.pt: Amanhã você vai consertar a caixa de correio.
translations.he: מחר אתה מתקן את תיבת הדואר.
translations.vi: Ngày mai bạn sẽ sửa hộp thư.
translations.id: Besok kamu akan memperbaiki kotak pos.
translations.ja: 明日あなたが郵便受けを直す。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, selects 'den Briefkasten' as direct object; modified by temporal adverb 'morgen'.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Briefkasten'.
Common noun; masculine, singular, accusative; direct object of 'reparierst'.
Temporal adverb indicating future time of the action.
